name: set_webhook
description: Set up a webhook URL to receive updates in real-time. Alternative to polling for new messages.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: HTTPS URL to send updates to. Your server must support HTTPS and have a valid SSL certificate.

parameters.name: certificate
parameters.description: Upload your public key certificate if you're using a self-signed certificate.

parameters.name: ip_address
parameters.description: The fixed IP address that the webhook will be sent to.

parameters.name: max_connections
parameters.description: Maximum allowed number of simultaneous HTTPS connections to the webhook. Default is 40.

parameters.name: allowed_updates
parameters.description: List of the types of updates you want your bot to receive.

parameters.name: drop_pending_updates
parameters.description: Pass True to drop all pending updates before setting the webhook.
